text.title: Acceptance Criteria Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-acceptance-criteria.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.note: ac_id pattern violated; shape not in enum; body missing; trace missing; story_id missing.

forbidden.pattern: AC body uses vague verbs ('should be user-friendly', 'performant').
Single story has 12+ AC; story is implicitly an epic.
